title: Excalibur | Aquaculture 2
description: A retexture of the mod, Aquaculture 2. Adapted and made to run alongside the Excalibur resource pack by Maffhew.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17510917f27bf9470cad17e3bd73389a623f443c_0.webp)

A **resource pack** designed to align the aesthetics of [Aquaculture 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture) mod with the [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack. This pack is considered 100% completed, containing 182 textures for various items and blocks.

## Installation: 
> Launch Minecraft and click on "Options"

> Click on "Resource Packs"

> Click on "Open Resource Pack Folder"

> Drag the Aquaculture2ExcaliburSupport.zip file into the resource pack folder
  
> Move the Aquaculture 2 Excalibur Support resource pack from the left column to the right

> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

> Select "Done" 

> GET FISHING
